description: Cross-platform release artifacts for xmlui-desktop: matrix CI build, single-file binary (app/ embedded), install scripts, and a /releases page that mirrors xmlui.org/get-started's shape.

items.before: Loopback HTTP server reads files from the on-disk `app/` directory next to the binary
items.after: Use `include_dir!` to embed `app/` into the binary at compile time. At runtime, prefer the on-disk `app/` if it exists next to the binary or one level up (preserves the local-dev filesystem-watcher reload loop); otherwise serve from the embedded tree. Tools app (`app/tools/`) gets the same treatment.

items.before: No CI; releases are produced manually from a local Mac
items.after: GitHub Actions workflow modeled on ~/xmlui-cli/.github/workflows/build.yml. Trigger: workflow_dispatch with `tag` input. Matrix: linux-amd64 (ubuntu-latest), macos-arm64 (macos-latest), macos-intel (macos-13), windows-amd64 (windows-latest). Each job runs `cargo build` (debug, since debug is the shipping format), packages `target/debug/xmlui-desktop[.exe]` as `xmlui-desktop-<label>.{tar.gz,zip}`, attaches to the release. A `publish-checksums` job downloads the artifacts, generates SHA256SUMS, and attaches it plus install.sh + install.ps1 to the release.

Add `install.sh` and `install.ps1` at the repo root, modeled on xmlui-cli's. install.sh: detect OS/arch, download matching archive + SHA256SUMS from latest release, verify, extract, copy `xmlui-desktop` to /usr/local/bin (or ~/.local/bin if not writable), `xattr -d com.apple.quarantine` on macOS, print PATH advice if needed. install.ps1: download xmlui-desktop-windows-amd64.zip + SHA256SUMS, verify with Get-FileHash, extract, copy `xmlui-desktop.exe` to ~/bin, ensure ~/bin on user PATH. Note: unlike xmlui-cli, no `xmlui-desktop install` self-install subcommand — install.sh/ps1 do everything.

items.before: Tools app has Workspace, Sessions, Architecture pages
items.after: Add `/releases` route with a new `Releases.xmlui` component. Content mirrors the structure of ~/xmlui/website/content/home/get-started.md: platform-tabbed install instructions (macOS/Linux details + Windows details), one-liner using install.sh/install.ps1 from the latest release, audit-friendly manual download alternative listing each platform archive name, troubleshooting section (PATH, quarantine, uninstall). Adapted for xmlui-desktop binary instead of xmlui CLI; no MCP-server registration section.
